< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.CourseFocus

Defines type of the course.

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
Subject

1

Relevant to one subject, for example ‘Geography’ or ‘Mathematics’. Often used with deadlines.
Class

2

Group multiple topics or subjects within a single course and display all learning content on the course overview page. Suitable for younger students.
SelfPaced

3

Let your students work at their own pace without time limits. Require use of plans.
InfoHub

4

Non-academic course used for information and file sharing, e.g. staff room.
